infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SBTM Driver uses Bluetooth to detect student SmartTags for automated boarding and alighting.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: SBTM Driver uses Bluetooth to detect student SmartTags.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SBTM Driver needs your location to track bus routes in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SBTM Driver needs background location access to continue tracking bus routes while the screen is off.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SBTM Driver needs background location to track bus routes while the screen is off.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to connect to Bluetooth devices for student SmartTag detection.
